zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Grey於大約1356年出生在英國諾圖波藍德林加姆時，她的父親Thomas de Heaton35歲，母親Margaret de Percy25歲。她和Philip Darcy至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1412年8月11日在英國林可爾史爾可乃斯享年57歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Grey于大约1356年出生在英国諾圖波藍德林加姆时，她的父亲Thomas de Heaton35岁，母亲Margaret de Percy25岁。她和Philip Darcy至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1412年8月11日在英国林可爾史爾可乃斯享年57岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Grey was born about 1356, in Chillingham, Northumberland, England, her father, Thomas de Heaton, was 35 and her mother, Margaret de Percy, was 25. She had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Philip Darcy. She died on 11 August 1412, in Knaith, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Grey est née environ 1356, à Chillingham, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Heaton, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Percy, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Philip Darcy. Elle est décédée le 11 août 1412, à Knaith, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Grey um 1356 in Chillingham, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Heaton 35 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Percy 25. Sie hatte mit Philip Darcy mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. August 1412 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Knaith, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Grey è nata il circa 1356 nel Chillingham, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Thomas de Heaton, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Percy, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Philip Darcy. Morì il 11 agosto 1412, nel Knaith, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Greyが約1356年にイギリスノースウンバーランドチリンガムで生まれた時，父Thomas de Heatonは35歳，母Margaret de Percyは25歳であった。彼女はPhilip Darcyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1412年8月11日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアナイスで57歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Grey(이)가 대략 1356년 영국 노르스벌랜드 치링함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Heaton(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Percy(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Philip Darcy(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1412년 8월 11일 영국 링코실르 나이스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Grey nasceu aproximadamente 1356, em Chillingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Heaton, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Percy, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Philip Darcy. Ela faleceu em 11 de agosto de 1412, em Knaith, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Grey родилась около 1356 г. в местности чиллингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Heaton было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Percy, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Philip Darcy. Она умерла 11 августа 1412 г. в местности неит, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Grey nació aproximadamente 1356, en Chillingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Heaton, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margaret de Percy, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Philip Darcy. Murió el 11 de agosto de 1412, en Knaith, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
